message:
feat(generators): remove NX delegation from classic/small/random generators

Pushes 54 more generator exports out of the NX_DELEGATED bucket into
PY_WRAPPER (now 437 / 56% vs. prior 383 / 49%). This is pure native
work with no runtime import of networkx for the common case.

Scope

  python/franken_networkx/__init__.py
    * complete_graph, cycle_graph, empty_graph, path_graph, star_graph:
      use nodes_or_number semantics (accept an int or an iterable of
      node labels) and only fall through to the Rust fast path when
      `create_using is None` and `n` is an integer — otherwise build
      the graph in-process with the proper graph class, so arbitrary
      labels and create_using overrides work exactly like NX.
    * binomial_graph gains `directed=` and `create_using=` pass-through
      to match nx.binomial_graph's full signature.
    * Adds direct implementations for LCF_graph, adjacency_graph,
      balanced_tree, barbell_graph, binomial_tree, bull_graph,
      chordal_cycle_graph, chvatal_graph, circulant_graph,
      circular_ladder_graph, complete_bipartite_graph, cubical_graph,
      and the full list enumerated in docs/coverage.md.
    * Introduces helpers _nodes_or_number_local,
      _classic_graph_from_create_using, _classic_default_graph_type,
      _add_nodes_in_order for consistent generator plumbing.

  python/franken_networkx/drawing/layout.py
    * _to_nx now delegates to the shared `backend._fnx_to_nx` converter
      instead of re-implementing node/edge copying inline. Removes
      drift risk between the two conversion paths.

  python/franken_networkx/backend.py
    * Dispatch guard: return False from the can_backend check for
      `average_shortest_path_length` when `method=` is passed, since
      the native implementation doesn't support method selection yet.
      Prevents dispatch() from silently running with the default method
      when the caller asked for something specific.

  tests/python/test_generator_delegations_parity.py
    * +551 lines of NX↔FNX parity tests for the newly-native
      generators, exercising node labels, create_using overrides,
      directed/undirected variants, and edge attributes.

  docs/coverage.md
    * Regenerated totals and per-bucket listings to reflect the 54
      generators moving from NX_DELEGATED (136 → 82) into PY_WRAPPER
      (383 → 437).

Why this matters

Each removed `import networkx as nx` inside a generator is one less
hard dependency at runtime. The goal is to be able to run
franken_networkx without NX installed; classic/small/random generators
were the biggest remaining delegation cluster.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
